core_mechanism: joint likelihood-based parameter inference that fuses several independent measurement channels into combined constraints on the parameters of a parametric model, extended by Fisher-information forecasting of how much a future measurement would tighten those bounds
brief_reason: The method combines CMB and BAO data to constrain the model's parameters and then forecasts a future survey's constraining power, i.e. joint-likelihood inference across independent data channels plus Fisher-style sensitivity forecasting.
